business_ideas.idea: Build architecturally beautiful data centers to reduce community opposition and NIMBY resistance
Create modern luxury off-road SUV replicating classic Defender appeal for contemporary buyers
Manufacture spare parts for classic vehicles that enthusiasts need but companies stopped making
Build premium adventure and exploration tourism business targeting high-net-worth individuals
Invest in sports teams and properties across multiple leagues to build portfolio

predictions.text: Classic vehicles will continue appreciating as collector items and status symbols
Wealthy entrepreneurs will increasingly fund passion projects and FU ventures regardless of ROI
